payload.label: basket
payload.long_description: Partial, vertically oriented gray woven basket with a textured herringbone/diamond weave and a visible top loop or handle; appears fabric-like (soft woven material), leaning against a light surface with its bottom near a wooden floor — top and right edges are cropped in the image; estimated distance ~0.8 m from camera.
